name: NewLake Capital Partners, Inc.
summary: PART I General NewLake Capital Partners, Inc., (the Company we, our, us,), a Maryland corporation, was formed on April 9, 2019 under the Maryland General Corporation Law, as GreenAcreage Real Estate Corp. (GARE) and subsequently changed our name to NewLake Capital Partners, Inc. We are an internally managed real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on providing real estate capital to state-licensed cannabis operators through sale-leaseback transactions, third-party purchases and funding for bu...
